channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A second sofa dumped in the road, 11th June
item.description:
As well as items dumped on the pathway of Charlton Park Lane there is also a second sofa dumped in the road, causing a hazard and is unsightly too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and sofa blocking pathway, 11th June
item.description:
There is a mattress and sofa been dumped on Charlton Park Lane (a frequent fly tipping location) which is hazardous to pedestrians and unsightly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on pavement by 64 Northumberland way, 11th June
item.description:
Continuous dog fouling along Northumberland way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture outside garages, 11th June
item.description:
Dumped furniture left too long outside the garages encourages other people to dump old stuff there as has happened before . The garages in question are at the very end of Turpington Lane just before the new build

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhearing vegetation along this section needs yearly flail cutting please, 11th June
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s Kilburn park station, 11th June
item.description:
Uneven pavement and cracks outside kilburn park station, lots of residents have hurt themselves due to this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped, 11th June
item.description:
Old Christmas tree, wooden plate, road work sign & rubbish bags under leaves.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lyme Farm Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s condor house, 11th June
item.description:
Street light damaged - this has caused the pavement to damage
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rudolph Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s condor house, 11th June
item.description:
Big puddle o/s condor house, there is nearby gully which may have caused it to flood.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rudolph Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped, 11th June
item.description:
Matter, rubbish bags, white tv unit & asbestos pipe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Courtlands Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch damaged, 11th June
item.description:
Tre branch broken and hanging off the tree.Can it be cut off.It is hanging low at bus deck level.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Falkirk Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crow Corpse, 11th June
item.description:
A crow with which it's neck seems to be dislocated has died on the footpath leading up to homes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green graffiti, 11th June
item.description:
Green graffiti on white wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Giles Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slab upended which is lose and would cause a serious accident, 11th June
item.description:
Street paving adjacent to Walden Road and Yester road damage cause possibly by tree roots.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yester Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flipping outside 90, 11th June
item.description:
This happens every week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Talfourd Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattresses at 2-24 Wotten Green, 11th June
item.description:
Please remove the fly tipped mattress on the grass area LBB land by 2-24 Wotten Green. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-22, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 44 Canfield Gardens, 11th June
item.description:
Too low hanging and have to duck to walk on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches sticking out into the road scratching car as drivers pass, 11th June
item.description:
Thorny branches sticking out into road from the fence. They are long enough to want to avoid, they clatter into the side of my car if I don’t drive further towards the center of the road. I have heard them scratching the paintwork. I am seeing cars try to avoid them daily.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incomplete pruning of street trees., 11th June
item.description:
Workmen haven't completed or properly pruned the line of trees in BR60DT. Adjacent to The Chenies.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Johns Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
